basic_details.short_information: National Cooperative Development Corporation (NCDC) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Chief Director. Candidates with Master's Degree/ Executive MBA/ Post Graduate Diploma, B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NCDC official website ncdc.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree/ Executive MBA/ Post Graduate Diploma in relevant fields, B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology or MCA.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level-13 (₹1,23,100 - ₹2,15,900/-) with approx. CTC of ₹40.4 LPA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NCDC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NCDC Chief Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
